Sacred Peaks Ranch Book 4

Lighting Her Fire

Buy Now

About

A guarded firefighter. A fiery archaeologist. One cabin, one bed, and all the heat. Aiden Raines (they/them), a seasoned firefighter who maintains strict control, meets Dr. Kiona Suchil (she/her), a brilliant archaeologist protecting her Ancestral Puebloan heritage work. Their professional friction ignites into personal spark. When an avalanche traps them in an isolated cabin, their defenses crumble as they discover that vulnerability builds the strongest shelter through trust rather than walls.

In This Book

  • 🚒 Firefighter x Archaeologist
  • 🧊 Ice & Fire Dynamic
  • ❄️ Snowed In / Forced Proximity
  • 🫦 Competence Kink
  • 🌈 Nonbinary (They/Them) Sapphic Rep
  • 💘 Low-Angst Instalove
  • 🏔️ Survival Romance
  • 🔥 High Heat
  • ❤️ Guaranteed HEA

Heat Level: High Heat

Can be read as standalone, 100% sapphic romance, 100% happy endings.

Praise For This Book

"A lovely story with both fascinating characters & in depth historical values."

— Verified Goodreads Reviewer

"Two competent women, an avalanche and native history. The Sacred Peaks series features strong, competent women who fall in love."

— Verified Goodreads Reviewer
